message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Webブラウザ" as browser
participant "CCM GUI (Web)" as ccm_gui_web
participant "CCM GUI (WebSocket)" as ccm_gui_ws
participant "CCM SDK (IPC)" as ccm_sdk_ipc

activate browser
activate ccm_gui_web
activate ccm_gui_ws
activate ccm_sdk_ipc

ccm_sdk_ipc -> ccm_sdk_ipc : ネットワーク情報変更通知 受信 (RegistRecieveNetworkInfoHandler)

note right of ccm_gui_ws
{
  "command": "NetworkInfo",
  "type": "notify",
  "data": {
    "ID": "xxx",
    "CellularInfo": [{
      "SignalStrength": "...",
      "SignalStrengthUnit": "...",
      "Operator": "...",
      "PLMN": "...",
      "Band": "...",
      "CellID": "...",
      "AirInterface": "...",
      "Manufacture": "...",
      "ModelName": "...",
      "IMEI": "..."
    }],
    "QosInterfaceType": {
      "key1": "val1",
      ...
    }
  }
}
end note

ccm_gui_ws --> ccm_gui_web : ネットワーク情報変更通知 [notify]

ccm_gui_web --> browser : 1秒間隔で保持データを画面に表示

deactivate browser
deactivate ccm_gui_web
deactivate ccm_gui_ws
deactivate ccm_sdk_ipc

@enduml
